suite: GoalOS Signoff Pro complete public website v22-v35

labs.title: Action Graph & Human Authority
labs.audience: Executives, reviewers, compliance teams, AI delivery leads
labs.promise: Shows why GoalOS prepares action, but never treats output as authority.

labs.title: Proof-Carrying Artifact & Evolution Ledger
labs.audience: Product teams, AI platform teams, governance stewards
labs.promise: Lets reusable capability earn upgrade rights through evidence, rollback, and ledgers.

labs.title: Independent Replay & Claim Promotion
labs.audience: Research reviewers, auditors, grant evaluators, diligence teams
labs.promise: Shows that one run is not proof; replay makes a claim institutionally usable.

labs.title: ProofZero Planning & Evidence Reanalyze
labs.audience: AI operators, mission designers, evaluation teams
labs.promise: Plans over proof-relevant work states instead of persuasive futures.

labs.title: Proof-Gated Mission Foundry & Curriculum
labs.audience: Program owners, frontier evaluation teams, autonomous work architects
labs.promise: Turns accepted proof into the next harder mission and curriculum.

labs.title: Process-Resolved Evidence
labs.audience: Corporate reviewers, analysts, legal/compliance observers, AI assurance teams
labs.promise: Makes process traces and lineage reviewable, not just final outputs.

labs.title: Blockchain Credibility Standard
labs.audience: Blockchain teams, DAOs, foundations, auditors, validators, investors, users
labs.promise: Shows why credible blockchain projects need proof packages before trust or settlement readiness.

labs.title: Blockchain Proof Mandate & Due Diligence
labs.audience: Users, DAO delegates, grant committees, treasury councils, auditors, investors, partners
labs.promise: Turns blockchain credibility into a requirement stakeholders can ask for, score, and enforce.

labs.title: Proof Before Settlement Research Standard
labs.audience: Foundations, DAOs, auditors, investors, exchanges, enterprises, partners
labs.promise: Turns the proof-to-settlement thesis into a paper, adoption blueprint, and due-diligence standard.

labs.title: Executive AI Proof Console
labs.audience: Executives, DAO delegates, auditors, investors, enterprises, AI operators
labs.promise: Makes GoalOS obvious to first-time visitors with a role-based, public-safe proof gate.

labs.title: From Loop to RSI
labs.audience: Frontier labs, governance teams, sovereign strategy leads
labs.promise: Connects proof loops to deterministic invention governance and RSI readiness.

labs.title: Loop → RSI → ASI Console
labs.audience: Safety leads, architecture councils, frontier lab directors
labs.promise: Shows the superintelligence control boundary: promotion cannot self-authorize.

labs.title: ASI Superintelligence Control Tower
labs.audience: Boards, councils, sovereign programs, assurance teams
labs.promise: Runs explanation modes, stress tests, rollback drills, council review, and Move‑37 dossier handling.

labs.title: ASI Mission Simulator
labs.audience: First-time visitors, executives, reviewers, blockchain teams, RSI/ASI governance audiences
labs.promise: Lets visitors experience the complete Loop → RSI → ASI path in one guided, button-only interactive lab.

note: All public demos are deterministic, synthetic, browser-local demonstrations. No user data or value movement.
